name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Download Events
notes: Edit this Building Block to include all object (file, folder, etc) download related event categories.

conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.File Download Attempt, Audit.File Download Failure, Audit.File Download Success, Audit.Object Download Attempt, Audit.Object Download Failure, Audit.Object Download Success
